verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Where could I go? When I was needing a refuge for my soul Where could I hide? With the avenger on my trail What could I do? When I was running with nowhere left to go? "Help me, Lord" I cried Then I saw Jesus standing there

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My City of Refuge I run into You You are my Hiding Place My City of Refuge let me hide myself in You Here in Your Pavilion I am safe My City of Refuge

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He is my Rock A firm Foundation that I can stand upon When the tempest rages He is the Harbour for my soul When I need shelter He's the strong Tower that I can run into Oh, Rock of Ages You are my Refuge from the storm

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My City of Refuge I run into You You are my Hiding Place My City of Refuge let me hide myself in You Here in Your Pavilion I am safe My City of Refuge

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: No more running, seeking for some peace of mind (My City of Refuge) No more searching for a refuge I can't find No more wandering Since that City came in sight With it's gates thrown open wide

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Where could I go? When I was needing a refuge for my soul Where could I hide? With the avenger on my trail What could I do? When I was running with nowhere left to go? "Help me, Lord" I cried Then I saw Jesus standing there

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: My city of refuge I run into You You are my Hiding Place My City of Refuge let me hide myself in You Here in Your Pavilion I am safe My City of Refuge

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: My city of refuge You are my Hiding Place My city of refuge
